                      Foundry Slot Demo
              CONFIDENTIAL · DRAFT · 2026-Q1


  Game ldentity                       Foundry Slot Demo
                                      A 5 reels × 3 rows base game, 20 fixed pay-
                                      lines, pays left-to-right from reel 1.

  RTl                                  Target 96.l5% across three certified variants.

  Symbols
      Wild                            Substitutes for all except scatter.
      Volcano                         Free Spins scatter, 3+ on screen triggers FS.
      Fireball                        Cash collect / money symbol, 6+ trigger Hold-and-
                                      Win.

  Features
      Free Spins                      Triggered by 3+ Volcano scatters.
      Hold and Win                    Cash Eruption mechanic, locks board on trigger.
      Expanding Wild                  Big Wild expands to a 3-high reel.

  Bet model
      20 fixed paylines, 1 coin per line, 21 bet steps.
